title: Gold Shredded Tissue Paper, 200g Glitter Gift Filler for Gift Boxes and Baskets, Premium Shredded Paper for Party Decorations and Seasonal Celebrations

amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 16,975 in Stationery & Office Supplies (See Top 100 in Stationery & Office Supplies) 58 in Shredded Packaging Filler

features: Premium Shredded Tissue Paper: Made from excellent material, this gold shredded tissue paper offers a soft and lightweight texture; The glitter effect enhances visual appeal under light, making it ideal for gifts and decorations. Very convenient.

Versatile Gift Filler: Perfect for filling gift boxes and baskets, this shredded paper provides an elegant touch; Its protective properties help safeguard fragile items during transit or storage. Very practical, suitable for use as gift box filling.

Party and Seasonal Decor: Enhance your celebrations with this gold shredded tissue paper; Suitable for various occasions including Easter, Christmas, and Valentine's Day, adding a festive sparkle to any setup. Very practical, and exquisite.

Easy to Use and Store: The 200g package is convenient for handling and storage; Simply fluff the shredded paper before use to achieve the desired volume and effect. Exquisite and beautiful, suitable for decoration at different parties and gatherings.

Eco-Conscious Choice: Designed for multiple uses, this shredded tissue paper can be reused for different events; Its durable quality ensures long-lasting performance without compromising on aesthetics. Suitable for different environments and occasions.
